news.t: ETF of the Week: Invesco Emerging Markets Sovereign Debt ETF (PCY)
The Iran War Is Changing the Bond Playbook

overview.description: The Invesco Emerging Markets Sovereign Debt ETF (PCY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US-dollar-denominated sovereign debt in emerging markets with at least 3 years to maturity. PCY was launched on Oct 11, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: The Iran War Is Changing the Bond Playbook
data.text: Investors may be better off looking outside the world's core bond markets right now, Brij Khurana writes in a guest commentary.
